title: Booja - Booja, The Signature Collection Gift Box | Selection of Vegan Chocolate Truffles, 184g
features: A Selection of 16 Deliciously Adventurous Truffles: Enjoy a delicious mix of Chocolate Orange, Deeply Chocolate, Chocolate Salted Caramel, and Honeycomb Caramel—each truffle offering its own unique, rich, and velvety experience.

Irresistible Flavours to Explore: Discover an assortment of indulgent chocolate truffles created in Mister Booja - Booja’s special parlour - each one crafted to surprise, delight, and satisfy chocolate lovers everywhere.

Perfect for Gifting: Whether you’re looking for a thoughtful gift for chocolate lovers or a decadent indulgence for yourself, this beautifully packaged soft-touch box enhances the gifting experience, making it a perfect addition to any celebration or special moment.
Certified Organic & Free-From friendly: Free from dairy, gluten, and soya. Made with minimal, high-quality ingredients. Perfect for those who seek exquisite chocolate without compromise.
Vegan & Palm Oil-Free: Elegantly simple and consciously crafted to be enjoyed by all. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians, and coeliacs. No palm oil or artificial additives.
Made in Norfolk, England: Craft and packed with care at our Booja-Booja HQ to ensure exceptional quality and flavour in every pack.
description: Product Description Discover the joys of vegan chocolate Delicious multi award-winning* chocolate truffles and truffle loglets: handmade with the finest organic ingredients to create moments of melt-in-the-mouth delight. *We're certified by The Vegan Society and The Soil Association. So far this year we've won 5 awards for our chocolate truffles, from The Great Taste Awards 2023, Free From Food Awards 2023 and Nourish Vegan Awards 2023. In total, we've won 174 awards (and counting) across our product range. A little more about us... Booja - Booja offers you delicious moments of beautifully sweet pleasure that help brighten the faces of friends and loved ones... and to occasionally quietly enjoy on your own. Using the minimal number of simple organic ingredients, we've been making delightful chocolate truffles in Norfolk since 1999. With many awards* for taste and quality, it's easy to see why we have quickly developed an enthusiastic following. All of our delicious products are dairy, gluten and soya free. They're also palm oil-free. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians and coeliacs. Sixteen Truffle Gifting Range 184g Scrumptious truffles featured in our Award Winning Seleciton... Hazelnut Crunch Melt in the mouth sweetly roasted hazelnut delights, coated in cocoa powder. Almond Salted Caramel Melt in the mouth, gooey sea salted caramel and roasted almonds swoons, coated in cocoa powder. Around Midnight Espresso Flying with the full flavour of deeply roasted Mexican beans, coated in cocoa powder. Rhubarb & Vanilla Fool Tangy rhubarb muddle in a creamy vanilla fool ganache, coated in cocoa powder. Stem Ginger Imbued with succulently delicious stem ginger pieces, coated in cocoa powder. Scrumptious truffles featured in our Signature Selection... Deeply Chocolate Pure, smooth, close your eyes, melt in the mouth chocolatiness, coated in cocoa powder. Chocolate Salted Caramel Seas of salted chocolate caramel chewiness, coated in cocoa powder. Chocolate Orange Juicy little bursts of tangy mandarin surprises, coated in cocoa powder. Honeycomb Caramel A full scrunch of our special caramel honeycomb, coated in cocoa powder. Single flavour packs also in this range... Fine de Champagne Charmingly befuddled with organic Fine de Champagne, coated in cocoa powder. Chocolate Salted Caramel Seas of salted chocolate caramel chewiness, coated in cocoa powder.
